---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, capability, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

Thanks for sharing an idea! Filling in the sections below helps us understand
the need and figure out the best way to address it.

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is difficult or impossible today?
Describe the use case rather than a specific implementation.

## Proposed tool or behavior

What would you like Breakpoint MCP to do? If you have a specific tool name,
inputs, or outputs in mind, describe them here.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you have thought about, and why they fall
short.

## Additional context

Which plane this relates to (Editor, Runtime, LSP/DAP, and so on), the Godot
version you are targeting, links, or anything else that would help.
